title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: A story about the choices that go into a life well lived and the many paths one could take.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
description: A lone astronaut must save the earth from disaster in this gripping sci-fi adventure.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A shocking psychological thriller about a woman's act of violence against her husband.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
description: A memoir about a young woman who leaves her survivalist family to pursue an education.

title: Circe
author: Madeline Miller
description: A bold and subversive retelling of the goddess's story, full of magic and tragedy.

title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: Timeless lessons on wealth, greed, and happiness through the lens of human behavior.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: The epic story of a young man destined to lead a revolution on a desert planet.

title: Where the Crawdads Sing
author: Delia Owens
description: A beautiful story of a girl living alone in the marsh and a murder mystery that follows.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: An exploration of the two systems that drive the way we think and make decisions.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A brief history of humankind, exploring how biology and history have defined us.

title: Verity
author: Colleen Hoover
description: A struggling writer finds a dark, unfinished manuscript that reveals terrifying secrets.
